scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter '@boboddy/containers' --filter '@boboddy/opencode-plugin' declarations && bun run --filter '*' typecheck
scripts.cli:link: bun run --filter @boboddy/cli build && bun run --filter @boboddy/cli link
scripts.cli:link:dev: bun run --filter @boboddy/opencode-plugin build && bun run --filter @boboddy/cli build:dev && bun run --filter @boboddy/cli link
